shots.narrative: Topped driver 190 yards, ball barely made it past the ladies tees, embarrassing start
Tried driver again from the fairway, sliced it deep into the right trees
Punched 7-iron from the trees back to the fairway, still 120 yards out
Pitching wedge from 50 yards, chunked it into the front bunker
Bunker shot came out heavy and rolled to 10 feet
Missed the bogey putt, tapped in for a triple bogey disaster
3-wood off the tee 150 yards, topped it again into the left rough
5-iron from the rough, shanked it right into the adjacent fairway
8-iron from 90 yards, thinned it over the green into the back bunker
Bunker shot to 20 feet past the hole
Three-putt from 20 feet for a triple bogey, completely fell apart
8-iron tee shot on par 3, chunked it into the water hazard short of the green
Drop ball, hit 8-iron again, this time airmailed the green into the back rough
Pitching wedge chip from 25 yards, came out hot and rolled to 30 feet
Three-putt from 30 feet for a quadruple bogey, nightmare hole
Driver 210 yards, huge slice into the right fairway bunker
5-iron from the bunker, caught it heavy and moved it 80 yards forward into more sand
Second bunker shot got out to 70 yards short of the green
Pitching wedge from 70 yards, landed on the green 35 feet from the pin
Three-putt from 35 feet for a triple bogey, putting is a disaster
Driver 230 yards, hooked left into the deep rough
4-iron from the deep rough, topped it 40 yards forward
Tried 4-iron again, shanked it right into the trees
Punched 7-iron from the trees to the fringe
Putt from the fringe lagged to 8 feet
Missed the 8-footer, tapped in for a triple bogey
6-iron tee shot on par 3, pushed way right into the bunker
Bunker shot came out low and ran to 25 feet past the pin
Three-putt from 25 feet for a triple bogey, can't make anything
Driver 200 yards, topped it into the ladies tee box
3-wood from the tee box, sliced it into the right rough
6-iron from the rough, caught it clean but pushed it 30 yards right of the green
Pitching wedge chip from 30 yards, chunked it to 15 feet
Missed the par putt, settled for a triple bogey
3-wood off the tee 170 yards, hooked left into the trees
Punched 5-iron from the trees, hit a branch and dropped straight down
5-iron again, topped it 40 yards forward
8-iron from 40 yards, chunked it into the front bunker
Bunker shot to 15 feet
Missed the bogey putt, tapped in for a triple bogey
Driver 240 yards, huge slice into the right fairway bunker
7-iron from the bunker, caught it heavy and moved it 60 yards
Pitching wedge from 70 yards, landed on the green 25 feet from the pin
Three-putt from 25 feet for a triple bogey, front nine was a disaster
Driver 220 yards, hooked left into the deep rough
5-iron from the rough, shanked it right into the adjacent fairway
8-iron from 80 yards, thinned it over the green
Pitching wedge chip from 25 yards, came out hot to 20 feet
Three-putt for a triple bogey, completely lost confidence
3-wood 160 yards, topped it into the left rough
6-iron from the rough, caught it clean but pushed it 40 yards right
Pitching wedge from 40 yards, chunked it to 15 feet
Missed the par putt, settled for a triple bogey
7-iron tee shot on par 3, chunked it into the water
Drop ball, 7-iron again, this time pushed it into the right bunker
Bunker shot to 20 feet
Three-putt for a quadruple bogey, absolutely brutal

3-wood from the tee, sliced it into the right trees
Punched 6-iron from the trees, hit another tree and dropped
8-iron from 60 yards, landed on the green 30 feet from the pin
Three-putt for a triple bogey, putting is completely broken

Punched 5-iron from the trees back to the fairway
7-iron from 140 yards, pushed it 30 yards right of the green
Pitching wedge chip to 12 feet

Bunker shot to 25 feet
Three-putt for a triple bogey, back nine is a nightmare

6-iron from the bunker, caught it heavy and moved it 60 yards
Pitching wedge from 80 yards, landed on the green 20 feet from the pin
Three-putt for a triple bogey, completely defeated
6-iron tee shot on par 3, pushed way right into the bunker
Bunker shot came out low and ran to 25 feet
Three-putt for a triple bogey, want to quit golf

3-wood from the tee, hooked left into the trees
